en: In the fifteenth year of the reign of Tiberius Caesar, Pontius Pilate being governor of Judea, and Herod being tetrarch of Galilee, and his brother Philip tetrarch of the region of Ituraea and Trachonitis, and Lysanias tetrarch of Abilene,
zh: 凱撒提庇留執政第十五年，本丟．彼拉多作猶太總督，希律作加利利的分封王，他兄弟腓力作以土利亞和特拉可尼地區的分封王，呂撒尼亞作亞比利尼的分封王，

en: during the high priesthood of Annas and Caiaphas, the word of God came to John the son of Zechariah in the wilderness.
zh: 亞那和該亞法作大祭司的時候， 神的話臨到撒迦利亞的兒子，在曠野的約翰。

en: And he went into all the region around the Jordan, proclaiming a baptism of repentance for the forgiveness of sins.
zh: 他就來到約旦河一帶地方，宣講悔改的洗禮，使罪得赦。

en: As it is written in the book of the words of Isaiah the prophet, "The voice of one crying in the wilderness: Prepare the way of the Lord, make his paths straight.
zh: 正如以賽亞先知的書上寫著： “在曠野有呼喊者的聲音： ‘預備主的道， 修直他的路！

en: Every valley shall be filled, and every mountain and hill shall be made low, and the crooked shall become straight, and the rough places shall become level ways,
zh: 一切窪谷都當填滿， 大小山岡都要削平！ 彎彎曲曲的改為正直， 高高低低的修成平坦！

en: and all flesh shall see the salvation of God."
zh: 所有的人都要看見 神的救恩。’”

en: He said therefore to the crowds that came out to be baptized by him, "You brood of vipers! Who warned you to flee from the wrath to come?
zh: 約翰對那出來要受他洗禮的群眾說：“毒蛇所生的啊，誰指示你們逃避那將要來的忿怒呢？

en: Bear fruits in keeping with repentance. And do not begin to say to yourselves, 'We have Abraham as our father.' For I tell you, God is able from these stones to raise up children for Abraham.
zh: 應當結出果子來，與悔改的心相稱；你們心裡不要說：‘我們有亞伯拉罕作我們的祖宗。’我告訴你們， 神能從這些石頭中給亞伯拉罕興起後裔來。

en: Even now the axe is laid to the root of the trees. Every tree therefore that does not bear good fruit is cut down and thrown into the fire."
zh: 現在斧頭已經放在樹根上，所有不結好果子的樹，就砍下來，丟在火裡。”

en: And the crowds asked him, "What then shall we do?"
zh: 群眾問他：“那麼，我們該作甚麼呢？”

en: And he answered them, "Whoever has two tunics is to share with him who has none, and whoever has food is to do likewise."
zh: 他回答：“有兩件衣服的，當分給那沒有的，有食物的也當照樣作。”

en: Tax collectors also came to be baptized and said to him, "Teacher, what shall we do?"
zh: 又有稅吏來要受洗，問他：“老師，我們當作甚麼呢？”

en: And he said to them, "Collect no more than you are authorized to do."
zh: 他說：“除了規定的以外，不可多收。”

en: Soldiers also asked him, "And we, what shall we do?" And he said to them, "Do not extort money from anyone by threats or by false accusation, and be content with your wages."
zh: 兵丁也問他：“至於我們，我們又應當作甚麼呢？”他說：“不要恐嚇，不要敲詐，當以自己的糧餉為滿足。”

en: As the people were in expectation, and all were questioning in their hearts concerning John, whether he might be the Christ,
zh: 那時眾人正在期待，人人心裡都在猜想會不會約翰就是基督。

en: John answered them all, saying, "I baptize you with water, but he who is mightier than I is coming, the strap of whose sandals I am not worthy to untie. He will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and with fire.
zh: 約翰對眾人說：“我用水給你們施洗，但那能力比我更大的要來，我就是給他解鞋帶都沒有資格。他要用聖靈與火給你們施洗。

en: His winnowing fork is in his hand, to clear his threshing floor and to gather the wheat into his barn, but the chaff he will burn with unquenchable fire."
zh: 他手裡拿著簸箕，要揚淨麥場，把麥子收進倉裡，卻用不滅的火把糠秕燒盡。”

en: So with many other exhortations he preached good news to the people.
zh: 他還用許多別的話勸勉眾人，向他們傳福音。

en: But Herod the tetrarch, who had been reproved by him for Herodias, his brother's wife, and for all the evil things that Herod had done,
zh: 分封王希律，因他弟弟的妻子希羅底，並因他自己所行的一切惡事，受到約翰的責備。

en: added this to them all, that he locked up John in prison.
zh: 他在這一切事以外，再加上一件，就是把約翰關在監裡。

en: Now when all the people were baptized, and when Jesus also had been baptized and was praying, the heavens were opened,
zh: 眾人受了洗，耶穌也受了洗。他正在禱告，天就開了，

en: and the Holy Spirit descended on him in bodily form, like a dove; and a voice came from heaven, "You are my beloved Son; with you I am well pleased."
zh: 聖靈仿佛鴿子，有形體地降在他身上；有聲音從天上來，說：“你是我的愛子，我喜悅你。”

en: Jesus, when he began his ministry, was about thirty years of age, being the son (as was supposed) of Joseph, the son of Heli,
zh: 耶穌開始傳道，年約三十歲，人以為他是約瑟的兒子，約瑟是希里的兒子，

en: the son of Matthat, the son of Levi, the son of Melchi, the son of Jannai, the son of Joseph,
zh: 依次往上推，是瑪塔、利未、麥基、雅拿、約瑟、

en: the son of Mattathias, the son of Amos, the son of Nahum, the son of Esli, the son of Naggai,
zh: 瑪他提亞、亞摩斯、拿鴻、以斯利、拿該、

en: the son of Maath, the son of Mattathias, the son of Semein, the son of Josech, the son of Joda,
zh: 瑪押、瑪他提亞、西美、約瑟、約大、

en: the son of Joanan, the son of Rhesa, the son of Zerubbabel, the son of Shealtiel, the son of Neri,
zh: 約哈難、利撒、所羅巴伯、撒拉鐵、尼利、

en: the son of Melchi, the son of Addi, the son of Cosam, the son of Elmadam, the son of Er,
zh: 麥基、亞底、哥桑、以摩當、珥、

en: the son of Joshua, the son of Eliezer, the son of Jorim, the son of Matthat, the son of Levi,
zh: 耶書、以利以謝、約令、瑪塔、利未、

en: the son of Simeon, the son of Judah, the son of Joseph, the son of Jonam, the son of Eliakim,
zh: 西緬、猶大、約瑟、約南、以利亞敬、

en: the son of Melea, the son of Menna, the son of Mattatha, the son of Nathan, the son of David,
zh: 米利亞、買拿、馬達他、拿單、大衛、

en: the son of Jesse, the son of Obed, the son of Boaz, the son of Sala, the son of Nahshon,
zh: 耶西、俄備得、波阿斯、撒門 、拿順、

en: the son of Amminadab, the son of Admin, the son of Arni, the son of Hezron, the son of Perez, the son of Judah,
zh: 亞米拿達、亞當民 、亞蘭 、希斯崙、法勒斯、猶大、

en: the son of Jacob, the son of Isaac, the son of Abraham, the son of Terah, the son of Nahor,
zh: 雅各、以撒、亞伯拉罕、他拉、拿鶴、

en: the son of Serug, the son of Reu, the son of Peleg, the son of Eber, the son of Shelah,
zh: 西鹿、拉吳、法勒、希伯、沙拉、

en: the son of Cainan, the son of Arphaxad, the son of Shem, the son of Noah, the son of Lamech,
zh: 該南、亞法撒、閃、挪亞、拉麥、

en: the son of Methuselah, the son of Enoch, the son of Jared, the son of Mahalaleel, the son of Cainan,
zh: 瑪土撒拉、以諾、雅列、瑪勒列、該南、

en: the son of Enos, the son of Seth, the son of Adam, the son of God.
zh: 以挪士、塞特、亞當，亞當是 神的兒子。
